debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSpace X
μ : Measure X
Y : Type u_2
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace Y
ν : Measure Y
f : X → Y
⊢ ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ), Irrational x

proof:
rw [ae_iff]
  simp only [Irrational, not_not, setOf_mem_eq]
  exact Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range _) volume
failed_attempts: exact ae_irrational

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬ Irrational x} = range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by ext; simp [Irrational]
  rw [this]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero
simpa only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not] using (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)).measure_zero

simp only [Irrational]
  exact (countable_range _).ae_not_mem

rw [ae_iff]
  simp only [Irrational, not_not_mem]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero
exact Set.Countable.ae_not_mem (Set.countable_range _)
simpa only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not, eq_comm] using (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)).measure_zero
exact ae_irrational

simp only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not]
  exact Countable.measure_zero (countable_range _) fun _ _ ↦ measure_singleton _

rw [Filter.eventually_iff]
  simpa [Irrational] using (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)).measure_zero

rw [ae_iff]
  convert Measure.countable_eq_zero (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ))
  ext
  simp [Irrational, eq_comm]

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬ Irrational x} = Set.range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by
    ext; rw [Irrational, Set.mem_range]; push_neg; simp [eq_comm]
  rw [this]
  exact (Set.countable_range _).measure_zero
exact ae_irrational

rw [ae_iff]
  convert (Set.countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)).measure_zero
  ext; simp [Irrational, eq_comm]

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬ Irrational x} = range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by
    ext; simp [Irrational, eq_comm]
  rw [this]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero

rw [Filter.eventually_iff]
  convert Measure.null_of_countable (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ))
  ext; simp [Irrational, eq_comm]
exact ae_irrational

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬Irrational x} = range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by
    ext; simp [not_irrational_iff_rat, mem_range]
  rw [this]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero fun _ _ ↦ measure_singleton _

simp only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not]
  exact Set.Countable.measure_zero (countable_range _)
exact ae_irrational
simpa [ae_iff, Irrational] using (countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)).measure_zero
exact ae_irrational
exact eventually_irrational
simpa only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not] using Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range _)

simpa [ae_iff, Irrational] using
    Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ)) fun x _ ↦ volume_singleton x
successful_attempts:
rw [ae_iff]
  simp only [Irrational, not_not, setOf_mem_eq]
  exact Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range _) volume

simp only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not]
  exact Set.Countable.measure_zero (Set.countable_range _) volume

rw [ae_iff]
  convert (Set.countable_range (fun (q : ℚ) ↦ (q : ℝ))).measure_zero volume
  ext; simp [Irrational, eq_comm]

simp only [ae_iff, Irrational, not_not]
  exact (Set.countable_range (fun (q : ℚ) ↦ (q : ℝ))).measure_zero volume

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬ Irrational x} = range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by
    ext; simp [Irrational, mem_range, eq_comm]
  rw [this]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero _

rw [ae_iff]
  have : {x | ¬ Irrational x} = range ((↑) : ℚ → ℝ) := by
    ext; simp [Irrational]
  rw [this]
  exact (countable_range _).measure_zero _
